description: A tourist calls the customer service line for help planning a trip from their hotel to a museum using public transit.

nodes.task_description: Gather the origin (hotel address) and destination (museum address) from the caller.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly notes the start and end points of the trip.

nodes.task_description: Use a trip planning tool to find the best route.

expected_outcome.value: The tool returns a recommended trip: 'Take Route 12 bus to Central Station, then transfer to the Red Line train.'

nodes.task_description: Clearly communicate the step-by-step instructions, including bus/train numbers, stop names, and estimated travel time, to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: The customer understands how to make their trip.
